prompt: Pharmaceutical vial product photography, vertical 4:5 portrait composition. The reference image shows the locked vial geometry, navy blue cap (hex #101850), studio lighting, label material, and bottom navy accent bar — reproduce all of these identically. Cap color must be EXACTLY hex #101850. Vial size: 3ml. LOCKED TYPEFACE: Helvetica Neue. Label content top to bottom: (1) Upper roughly 60 percent of the label is a blank pristine white logo zone — no graphics, no text, no marks. (2) Centered, the product name 'BPC-157' in HELVETICA NEUE BOLD (~700 weight) in dark charcoal grey, perfectly horizontally centered, natural letter proportions. (3) Directly below, centered, the dose-and-volume line '5 mg · 3 ml' in HELVETICA NEUE BOLD at ~60 percent of product-name size, charcoal grey, perfectly centered. (4) Below that with a small gap, the compliance text rendered as TWO STACKED LINES, each line perfectly horizontally centered on the label, both lines in HELVETICA NEUE LIGHT (~300 weight, definitely NOT bold), all-caps, in medium grey, at roughly 22 percent of the product-name size, with tight line spacing between the two lines. The two lines are: line 1: 'FOR RESEARCH USE ONLY', line 2: 'NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION'. Each line is its own complete centered string — line 1 ends after 'ONLY' with no trailing punctuation, line 2 starts with 'NOT'. Both lines are equal in size, weight, and color, stacked tightly together as an intentional two-line disclaimer block (NOT word-wrapped, but deliberately formatted as a clean two-line stack). (5) Directly below the second compliance line with a small gap, centered, the lot line 'LOT: NH-1024' in HELVETICA NEUE LIGHT at the same small size, medium grey, perfectly horizontally centered (NOT left-aligned, equal margins on both sides). (6) At the very bottom edge of the label, the slim solid navy blue accent bar at exactly hex #101850 running edge to edge. NO hairlines anywhere. CRITICAL ALIGNMENT — every text element is perfectly horizontally centered on the label with equal margins on both sides. CRITICAL TYPOGRAPHY — Helvetica Neue Bold for product name + dose only; Helvetica Neue Light for the two compliance lines + lot line. Sharp focus, high resolution, premium pharmaceutical product shot, clinical minimalist aesthetic.
